Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">
Composed compose-external-wave-13 using authoring SSOT (`docs/src/authoring/skills/verification-before-completion.mdx`) + research. Do not run `wagents docs generate` on this file (HAND-MAINTAINED sentinel). Run `/review source` before using in production or promoting.
</Aside>

## What It Does

Final verification of tests, plan compliance before branch finish/merge. Part of obra/superpowers agentic skills framework & software development methodology. Prompt-only skills (no observed hooks/scripts in source-list); composable workflow: brainstorming -&gt; writing-plans -&gt; executing-plans + test-driven-development + verification-before-completion. Complements local orchestrator/test-architect/review.

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add obra/superpowers --skill brainstorming --skill systematic-debugging --skill test-driven-development --skill writing-plans --skill executing-plans --skill verification-before-completion -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Agent workflow discipline from `obra/superpowers`. Prompt-only skills with no observed hooks or scripts in source-list output; complements local `orchestrator`, `test-architect`, and `review` without duplicating them.
